s: Run full Linux desktop environments on Android with GPU acceleration
d: FluxLinux brings full Linux desktops to Android. Install Debian with XFCE4, run dev tools, and use GPU acceleration. Features: • One-tap Debian install • GPU acceleration (Turnip/VirGL) • Web, App, and Data Science stacks • XFCE4 desktop with themes • Rooted & Non-rooted support Requirements: Termux, Termux:X11 Note: Uses AccessibilityService API for system navigation actions (Back/Home) from the UI. No data is collected.
